phase1_baseline_capex_eur.rationale: Bottom-up: liquid-cooling fit-out + substations + civil works + hardware (70% hedged) for 500 MW–1 GW; base sits at the midpoint of the €5–10B Phase 1 envelope after notionally reserving room for remediation and buffer holding.

brownfield_remediation_actual_eur.rationale: Risk 9 names a €250–750M baseline budget and a €500M–€2.25B blow-out scenario if hazardous materials require advanced handling; bounds span both regimes.

buffer_annual_holding_cost_per_ha_eur.rationale: Review Issue 2 names a €50k–75k/ha/year regional estimate with a €20k/ha overrun-sensitivity bracket; bounds extend on the upside to capture a less favourable cadastral-charge regime.

tenant_take_or_pay_actual_share.rationale: Plan target is 60%; base just below to reflect realistic LOI-to-take-or-pay slippage in a high-CAPEX AI compute market; downside captures Risk 3 stranded-capital scenario.

phase1_pue_actual.rationale: Risk 2 names a 1.25–1.35 brownfield drift scenario at 1 GW; base sits just above the 1.20 target to reflect realistic integration friction; lower tail captures best-case digital-twin-validated liquid cooling.

phase1_pue_target_max.rationale: Plan commits to 1.20 ceiling under liquid cooling; spread reflects how strictly tenant SLA escalator clauses (Risk 2) interpret the target — stricter at the lower end, relaxed at the upper.
